base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of scenarios_select — a ui from 1989 simcity. Scenario select — 5 preset disasters (Las Vegas monster + Bern traffic + Tokyo earthquake etc.) + difficulty. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Scenario select — 5 preset disasters (Las Vegas monster + Bern traffic + Tokyo earthquake etc.) + difficulty
